risk_if_not_implemented: Without Physical Access Logs, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Continuous Monitoring
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of enterprise-wide monitoring controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Continuous Monitoring (MON-01) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Physical Access Logs (PES-03.3) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the facility and physical environment focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Monitoring Physical Access
compensating_control_2.description: Physical access control mechanisms exist to monitor for, detect and respond to physical security incidents.
compensating_control_2.justification: Monitoring Physical Access (PES-05) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Physical Access Logs (PES-03.3) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the facility and physical environment focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
